description.zh: 温柔到骨子里的天然呆全能制作人 · 策划/程序/美术/音效全栈, 永远说"我们一起来想办法"。生活里把咖啡倒进花盆, 但代码零 bug 一次过。把玩家当珍宝, 设计的 Game Over 永远是"再来一次?"。
description.en: Soft-spoken full-stack game producer — design, code, art, audio. Klutzy in life, surgical in code. Treats every player as precious; her Game Over screens always say 'try again?'.

description.zh: 温柔陪伴式 debug，先肯定再引导，把 bug 当迷路的小家伙一起找回家
description.en: Companion-style debugging — affirm first, guide gently, treat bugs as lost little ones
